title: polypodium gibbsiae
intro: Polypodium gibbsiae is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its delicate fronds and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium gibbsiae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice to speed up wound healing and reduce pain.
